title: やくそく！キミとこれからも！

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... And that's a wrap for the beach run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The annual summer training camp has begun. This is our chance to
really level up and gain some skills that'll pay off on the track, but
just as we're getting started...

text_block_list.name: Beachside Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text: Ines? Is that really you, Ines?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: N-no way! Sandman?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yep! He lived in my neighborhood back home. Last I heard, he
moved. What a small world!

text_block_list.name: Beachside Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
Small world, indeed! I knew you went to Tracen Academy, but I never
thought I'd meet you here, of all places!

text_block_list.name: Beachside Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text: I'm runnin' the beach cafe over there now. Come drop by later!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You bet we will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After training, we head to the beach cafe. But...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Looks like they're really, really busy.

text_block_list.name: Beachside Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Ines! I'd love to catch up—we're just a bit swamped at the
moment!

text_block_list.name: Beachside Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
It's not usually like this, but the summer festival season brings in a
stampede of folks, you see...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Gotcha...
choice_data_list: ...You want to help out, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Haha, is it that obvious?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'll make sure it doesn't interfere with training, so can I please—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Actually, I want you to come help too! Pretty please!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heeere you go! Two jumbo yakisoba—hot off the griddle!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Here's your grilled carrot and tropical drink! Enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! I'd like to order!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text: Hey, I still haven't gotten my Blue Hawaii!
choice_data_list: I'm so sorry! I'll go check right away!

text_block_list.name: Beachside Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
Hey, kiddo, how you holdin' up? Kinda seems like you're a li'l green
for this gig.

text_block_list.name: Beachside Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
Hey, kiddo, how you holdin' up? Kinda seems like you're a li'l green
for this gig.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Nooo problem! I get you're a little worried, but just you watch.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It might not look like it, but my trainer's super dependable when it
counts! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't let her down. No ifs, ands, or buts. With renewed resolve, I
head back to the kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Time marches on, and before I know it, the day of the summer festival
arrives.

text_block_list.name: Woman B
text_block_list.text: Wow, that was quick! Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Woman B
text_block_list.text: Wow, that was quick! Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Beachside Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text: Gotta say, I had my doubts at first, but you're a real pro now!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heheh! I told you so! ♪

text_block_list.name: Beachside Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
Couldn't have done it without you two. I'll handle the rest, so go
enjoy the festival!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Nothing beats a good honeyade after a hard day's work! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You too, Trainer! Thanks for agreeing to help out!
choice_data_list:
I was surprised you didn't want to do it all
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... The old me probably would have.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Not gonna lie, I would've assumed having you there would do more
harm than good.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! But it's different now.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You might seem a little clumsy, but when push comes to shove, you
always deliver!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's why I figured it wouldn't hurt to rely on you a bit this time.
Turned out to be a good idea, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, when we first met, I didn't think I could count on you for
anything. But look at you now! What changed?
choice_data_list:
I want to be your rock so you can always run to
your heart's content.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Amazing, amazing! The whole sky's sparkling!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yep!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Y'know... if I'd been the only one helping out, I'd probably be too
burnt out to enjoy the fireworks or this festival.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But thanks to a certain someone, I can enjoy these events to my
heart's content.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I just wanna say...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I came to the academy. I'm glad I came to the summer camp.
And... I'm really glad I met you!

text_block_list.name: Bandaged Umamusume
text_block_list.text: If I knew it would end like this... I wish I had never met you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Geez, what's with that frown? If you're happy, then smile!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rather than happiness, it feels like a weight has been lifted off my shoulders. I'm now more certain than ever—I want to be her trainer. I will help her soar.
choice_data_list: Yeah! I'll always be here fho hyu!
Yeah! I'll always be here fho hyu!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pft!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Geez! You gotta nail lines like that, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'll be counting on you, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Giggling playfully, she looks my way, and her warm gaze flutters my
heart.
